features.summaryKey: Real-time AI form analysis with voice coaching — detects movement phases, counts reps, and grades each checkpoint as pass, caution, or fail.
Receive AI-recommended corrective exercises based on your posture analysis, with history tracking and trend insights.
Manage habits with time-of-day grouping, category filters, completion charts, activity heatmaps, weekly reports, and quick-start templates.
Your Apple Watch tracks gait symmetry while walking and nudges you to stretch after prolonged sitting — all from the accelerometer.
Health metrics like steps and sleep automatically link to your habits, tracking progress without manual input.
Get a reminder to put on your Apple Watch before bed so you never miss a night of sleep tracking.
